payload.title: Tier 2 — Diagnostics as an agent action stream
payload.description:
Turn the teaching-error contract (why: + literal help:) into something an autonomous agent loop consumes directly. This is the 'for the agent, not the human' thesis applied to the OUTPUT format, not the language — the third moat Clippy lacks.

Clippy has --fix and JSON, but not a why + literal-replacement + confidence contract aimed at an autonomous loop. Reuses the CalleeRegistry already built.
